title: Conductive Ink
description:
Purchase materials for your own experiments, go to http://secure.workingink.co.uk/working-ink-shop/ 
So, for those guys that have asked the link to get this stuff is https://sites.google.com/site/thinkinkfactory 123 or this link tinyurl.com/an96jza which a good friend did for me I am currently in Sri Lanka working with some guys in a grpahite mine and at a graphite factory. Sri Lankan graphite is really getting up there on the radar and the stuf they have here has some very unusual properties. It is highly thermally conductive, electrically conductive and diamagnetic. Of course all graphite is but his stuff is unusual in the degree of its conductivity. We have come up with this ink that the guys are selling it has a conductivity of around 1-2 ohms per centimeter on a good day and 50 ohms per centimeter on a bad day - so it is leagues ahead of whatever else is out there. It's a lot of fun just having tons of this stuff to play around with!
